query:
SELECT a.id, a.workerId, a.weekStartDate, a.weekEndDate, a.confirmedAt, 
       JSON_LENGTH(a.timeBlocks) as timeBlocks_count
FROM availability a
JOIN workers w ON a.workerId = w.id
WHERE w.name LIKE '%穆伊娜%' OR w.name LIKE '%INA%'
ORDER BY a.weekStartDate DESC;
